subtitle: Classic trick-taking card game
age_rating_notes: Card game with online multiplayer interactions.
No simulated gambling with real money should be claimed in storefront text.
promotional_text: Play a streamlined version of Preferans on iPhone and iPad. Start a table, share an invite link, and challenge friends in a clean, focused card-room experience.
description:
Preferans brings the classic trick-taking card game to iOS in a streamlined format built for quick matches with friends.

Set up a 3-player table or use the 4-player rotating-dealer format, bid for trump, take the talon, and play through each hand with simple touch controls.

Current features:
- Local table setup for 3 or 4 players
- Simplified bidding and talon exchange flow
- Trick-taking gameplay with suit-following and trump rules
- Shareable invite-link concept for online rooms
- Score tracking across hands

Planned improvements:
- Full Preferans contract variants and scoring
- Real online rooms and invite handling
- Better table presentation and animations
- Solo play against bots

Preferans is intended for players who already know the game or want a lightweight digital version to learn the flow.
review_notes: The current build contains a simplified Preferans ruleset. If online multiplayer is enabled in the submitted build, provide reviewer test steps and demo accounts here.
